text: A balanced lifestyle is the foundation of healthy living. Eating a balanced diet, rich in fruits, vegetables, lean proteins, and whole grains, gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, such as walking, cycling, or playing a sport, strengthens your body and improves your mood. However, staying healthy is not just about physical activity. Getting enough sleep, around seven to nine hours each night, is essential for recovery and focus. Equally important is your mental health—try to manage stress by relaxing and doing things you enjoy. Finally, a good work-life balance means setting time aside for work, rest, and fun. Small daily habits can lead to a healthier, happier life.
